name: Diabetic Elegant Fruit Compote
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15-1/4 oz.) del monte pineapple tidbits in its own juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Moisten the sliced banana with the reserved juice to prevent browning.
3. Drain the bananas.
4. Arrange the fruit in a dish.
5. Drizzle with liqueur.
6. Garnish with sprigs of fresh mint, if desired.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings. This recipe can be made from a can of DelMonte Pineapple tidbits.
